category_sources: source_facts.description identifies gedit as the GNOME text editor.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name and source_facts.description use the name gedit.
docs_sources: Official gedit documentation page links to the gedit user manual; official technology page links to developer documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.source-archive is from gitlab.gnome.org/World/gedit/gedit; official gedit blog says the main Git repositories are hosted under the World/gedit subgroup on GNOME GitLab.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies the GNOME text editor; official user manual covers files, search, tabs, syntax highlighting, and plugins.
